allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./constants/seasonPrices.json'\); console.log\('priceKeys:',d.priceKeys\); console.log\('카우리 in 쾰른:',d.prices['쾰른']?.['카우리']\); console.log\('카우리 in 스트라스부르:',d.prices['스트라스부르']?.['카우리']\); console.log\('카우리 sample \(서지중해 카르타헤나\):',d.prices['카르타헤나']?.['카우리']\);")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('prices_base.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('cities:', len\(d\)\); print\('keys of first:', list\(d[0].keys\(\)\)\); items=set\(\); [items.update\(k for k in c if k!='_id'\) for c in d]; print\('items:', sorted\(items\)\)")
